data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for cost tracking per mailing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for 'Cost tracking per mailing', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence or checks related to cost tracking functionalities, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific evidence confirming the implementation or functionality of cost tracking, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of cost tracking per mailing functionality.
